title: Peer Mentor, KamiLimu Cohort 9
summary: Selected as Peer Mentor for KamiLimu Cohort 9. Prepared mentees for pitches, presentations, speech rehearsals, and essay reviews while ensuring the program remained a supportive and human experience.
details: Prepared mentees for pitches, presentations, and speech rehearsals with direct, honest feedback.
Reviewed and refined essays for scholarship applications and professional communications.
Focused on making the mentorship experience feel human: genuine connection alongside professional development.
Transition from Cohort 8 mentee to Cohort 9 peer mentor demonstrates program investment and leadership growth.
